Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class LeadConfigSettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.MetadataForSettings
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.LeadConfigSettings
public class LeadConfigSettings extends MetadataForSettings

Java class for LeadConfigSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="LeadConfigSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}MetadataForSettings">
       <sequence>
         <element name="doesEnableLeadConvertDefaultSubjectBlankTaskCreation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="doesHideOpportunityInConvertLeadWindow" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="doesPreserveLeadStatus" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="doesSelectNoOpportunityOnConvertLead" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="doesTrackHistory" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableConversionsOnMobile" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableOrgWideMergeAndDelete" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="shouldLeadConvertRequireValidation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="shouldSendNotificationEmailWhenLeadOwnerUpdatesViaApexInLEX" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
